content: <heading>Thank you for using Misaki!</heading><paragraph>These Terms of Use apply to your use of any AI-based personal services we provide, as well as any related software applications and websites (collectively, the "Services"). These Terms form an agreement between you and Nanjing Zhongyuan Misaki Technology Co., Ltd., including our service terms and important provisions on resolving disputes through arbitration. By using our Services, you agree to these Terms.</paragraph><heading>Registration and Access</heading><paragraph><bold>Minimum age.</bold> You must be at least 13 years old, or the minimum age required in your country, to agree to use the Services. If you are under 18, you must have permission from a parent or legal guardian to use the Services.</paragraph><paragraph><bold>Registration.</bold> You must provide accurate and complete information to register an account and use our Services. You may not share your account credentials with others or allow others to use your account, and you are responsible for all activities that occur under your account. If you create an account or use the Services on behalf of another person or entity, you must have the authority to accept these Terms on their behalf.</paragraph><heading>Using Our Services</heading><paragraph><bold>What you may do.</bold> Subject to your compliance with these Terms, you may access and use our Services. When using our Services, you must comply with all applicable laws, as well as our sharing and publishing policies, usage policies, and any other documents, guidelines, or policies we provide to you.</paragraph><paragraph><bold>What you may not do. </bold> You may not use our Services for any illegal, harmful, or abusive activities. For example, you may not:</paragraph><unorderedList><listItem>Use our Services for any illegal or unauthorized activities.</listItem><listItem>Use our Services in a way that infringes, misappropriates, or violates the rights of others.</listItem><listItem>Modify, copy, lease, sell, or distribute any of our Services.</listItem><listItem>Attempt or assist anyone in reverse engineering or decompiling the source code or components of our Services.</listItem><listItem>Automatically or programmatically extract data or outputs.</listItem><listItem>Represent output as human-generated when it is not.</listItem><listItem>Interfere with or disrupt our Services, including bypassing any rate limits or restrictions, or circumventing any protective or security mitigation measures we put in place on the Services.</listItem></unorderedList>
